firstConsultation.title: First Consultation
includes: Comprehensive naturopathic intake (health history, lifestyle, nervous system, emotional landscape)
Personalised protocol — nutrition, phytotherapy, supplementation as relevant
Nervous-system regulation tools tailored to your day
Written follow-up summary delivered within a week

followUp.title: Follow-up Consultation
followUp.blurb: For continuing the work — refining the protocol, deepening practices, adjusting as you change.

shortSupportSeries.title: Short Support Series
shortSupportSeries.blurb: A focused 3- or 4-session arc for people who want a clearer beginning, with intake, practice between sessions, and a written summary at the end.
